name: Pharaoh of Chains
lore_text:
Pharaoh of Chains — Major-Bosses of Veil/Oath Duality.
A super presence whose choices bend the battlefield toward fate.
Iconography: Veil/Oath sigils, attire marked by duty.
mechanics_text:
Standard Initiative (5)
🛡️ Guard 4 • ⚔️ First Strike 4
Shrouded on entry; adjacent enemies −1 accuracy; Allies within 1 tile gain +1 Guard this round; End step: pay 1 supply or take 2 recoil.
• Count resources; burst then rotate.
• Pair with allies that cover your weakest stat.
• Trade only when your initiative window is open.
